category_sources: Official prek documentation describes it as a reimagined version of pre-commit built in Rust.
source_facts.description says prek is a fast Git hook manager written in Rust and a drop-in alternative to pre-commit.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official prek documentation both use the display name prek.
docs_sources: Official prek documentation site includes installation, quickstart, configuration, language support, CLI reference, and changelog sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is intentionally returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: Official prek documentation lists compatibility with pre-commit configurations, built-in hooks, and code-quality workflows.
source_facts.description identifies a Rust Git hook manager and pre-commit alternative.
